S.FORM: yaw nqa nkis raral hiya ga, kahul sqa son mha i
S.PHON: jaw nqa nkis raral ħija ɣa, kaħul sqa son mħa i
S.FORM: yaw nqa nkis raral hiya ga, kahul sqa son mha i
S.PHON: jaw nqa nkis~ɕ raral ħija ɣa, kaħul s~ɕqa s~ɕon mħa i

S.FORM: raral raral bably, yaw na bnkis ay. nkis balay yaw ay
S.PHON: raral raral β~vaβ~vlj, jaw na β~vnkis aj. nkis β~valaj jaw aj
S.FORM: raral raral bably, yaw na bnkis ay. nkis balay yaw ay
S.PHON: raral raral βaβlj, jaw na βnkis~ɕ aj. nkis~ɕ βalaj jaw aj

S.FORM: baha msa pinpongan maku ay, ga iyat mha htgan mwani ga.
S.PHON: β~vaħa msa pinpoŋan maku aj, ɣa ijat mħa ħtɣan mwani ɣa.
S.FORM: baha msa pinpongan maku ay, ga iyat mha htgan mwani ga.
S.PHON: βaħa ms~ɕa pinpoŋan maku aj, ɣa ijat mħa ħtɣan mwani ɣa.
